items.title_en: Why U.S. AI giants like Anthropic, OpenAI are launching major expansions in London

items.desc_zh: 英国首都已成为许多全球最受关注的人工智能公司的关键增长目标。

items.title_en: Bank of America buys into agentic AI trade, double upgrades this stock

items.desc_en: The bank thinks a growing market for CPUs will be a boon to the chipmaker that has surged more than 60% since its first quarter earnings report release.
items.desc_zh: 该银行认为，不断增长的 CPU 市场将给这家芯片制造商带来福音，自第一季度收益报告发布以来，该芯片制造商的股价已飙升超过 60%。

items.title_en: Here are the odds of bear markets in each stock index this summer
items.title_zh: 以下是今年夏天各股指进入熊市的可能性
items.desc_en: For the S&P 500, a technical bear market decline of 20% from the closing high of 7,610 would mean a slide to 6,088.
items.desc_zh: 对于标准普尔 500 指数来说，技术熊市从收盘高点 7,610 点下跌 20% 将意味着跌至 6,088 点。

items.title_en: The first Wall Street firms are out with their SpaceX recommendations. Here's what they're saying
items.title_zh: 第一批华尔街公司提出了他们对 SpaceX 的建议。他们是这么说的
items.desc_en: Two firms initiated coverage, with each forecasting gains for the Elon Musk company in its first year to 18 months based on their price targets.
items.desc_zh: 两家公司发起了报道，各自根据其价格目标预测埃隆·马斯克公司在第一年至 18 个月内的收益。

items.title_en: SpaceX IPO is a ‘referendum’ on Musk, say market watchers
items.title_zh: 市场观察人士称，SpaceX IPO是对马斯克的一次“公投”
items.desc_en: Friday's hotly anticipated SpaceX market debut could prove a defining moment for capital markets — and serve as a "referendum" on Elon Musk's leadership.
items.desc_zh: 周五备受期待的 SpaceX 上市可能成为资本市场的决定性时刻，并成为对埃隆·马斯克领导力的“公投”。

items.title_en: Vance says Israeli PM Netanyahu 'has got some things wrong'
items.title_zh: 万斯称以色列总理内塔尼亚胡“犯了一些错误”
items.desc_en: The US vice-president says the Israeli leader "aggressively asserts" his country's interests, but they do not always align with those of the US.
items.desc_zh: 美国副总统表示，以色列领导人“积极维护”其国家的利益，但这些利益并不总是与美国的利益保持一致。

items.title_en: U.S. becomes India’s top gas supplier, as Iran war cuts it off from the Gulf

items.title_zh: 特朗普承诺对伊朗发动更多袭击，称美国将“非常严厉地打击他们”
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump promised more attacks on Iran after strikes resumed this week. Earlier this week, he said a deal to end the war was near.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统承诺在本周恢复袭击后对伊朗进行更多袭击。本周早些时候，他表示即将达成结束战争的协议。

items.title_en: Mute
items.title_zh: Mute
items.desc_en: A visual productivity tool to visualize your brian-dump
items.desc_zh: 可视化生产力工具，可视化你的布莱恩转储

items.title_en: College sticker prices top $100,000 at 16 schools — but many students pay significantly less
items.title_zh: 16 所学校的大学标价高达 10 万美元，但许多学生支付的费用要低得多
items.desc_en: The cost of attendance at a growing number of colleges is now more than six figures a year, according to data from The Princeton Review.
items.desc_zh: 根据《普林斯顿评论》的数据，越来越多的大学的入学费用现在每年超过六位数。

items.title_en: Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon kill 17, reports say
items.title_zh: 报道称，以色列对黎巴嫩南部的袭击造成 17 人死亡
items.desc_en: Nine of them were killed in a series of attacks in the town of Tayr Debba, according to Lebanon's state news agency.
items.desc_zh: 据黎巴嫩国家通讯社报道，其中九人在泰尔德巴镇发生的一系列袭击中丧生。

items.title_en: FBI raids home of alleged pro-Palestine activist in Ypsilanti - MLive.com
items.title_zh: FBI 突袭了伊普西兰蒂涉嫌亲巴勒斯坦活动人士的家 - MLive.com
items.desc_en: FBI raids home of alleged pro-Palestine activist in Ypsilanti  MLive.comFeds charge 8 pro-Palestinian activists with conspiring to intimidate U of Michigan officials  ClickOnDetroit | WDIV Local 4UM g
items.desc_zh: 联邦调查局突击搜查伊普西兰蒂涉嫌支持巴勒斯坦活动人士的家  MLive.com 联邦调查局指控 8 名亲巴勒斯坦活动人士密谋恐吓密歇根大学官员  ClickOnDetroit | WDIV 本地 4UM g

items.title_en: Kalshi to make some users reveal job details to tackle insider trading
items.title_zh: Kalshi 要求部分用户透露工作细节以应对内幕交易
items.desc_en: After issues with insider trading, the prediction betting platform is adding new rules.
items.desc_zh: 在出现内幕交易问题后，预测博彩平台正在添加新规则。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: Check before check-in. What's behind a new safety campaign about power banks on aircraft?
items.desc_zh: 入住前请检查。关于飞机上移动电源的新安全运动背后的原因是什么？

items.title_en: Version of AI tool 'too powerful for public' released to public
items.title_zh: 人工智能工具版本“对公众来说太强大”向公众发布
items.desc_en: Claude Fable 5 is a version of Anthropic's Claude Mythos, an AI program which caused a stir among technology, finance, and government leaders
items.desc_zh: Claude Fable 5 是 Anthropic 的 Claude Mythos 的一个版本，这是一个在技术、金融和政府领导人中引起轰动的人工智能程序

items.title_en: Farage says Reform has contacted X 'at highest level' over fake AI ads
items.title_zh: Farage 表示 Reform 已就虚假 AI 广告问题与“最高层”X 联系
items.desc_en: The fake ads feature the governor of the Bank of England - the Bank has urged people to report them.
items.desc_zh: 这些虚假广告的主角是英格兰银行行长，该银行已敦促人们举报这些广告。

items.title_en: EU orders Meta to open WhatsApp to rival AI chatbots
items.title_zh: 欧盟命令 Meta 向人工智能聊天机器人开放 WhatsApp
items.desc_en: Meta has accused the EU of "regulatory overreach" and says its decision will allow tech giants like OpenAI free access to WhatsApp.
items.desc_zh: Meta 指责欧盟“监管越权”，并表示其决定将允许 OpenAI 等科技巨头免费使用 WhatsApp。

items.title_en: Asmi AI
items.title_zh: Asmi AI
items.desc_en: AI that handles your personal chores in the real world
items.desc_zh: 人工智能可以处理现实世界中的个人事务

items.title_en: Could humanoid robots be heading for the battlefield?
items.title_zh: 人形机器人会走向战场吗？
items.desc_en: Armed forces are experimenting with humanoid robots, but battlefield deployment is some way off.
items.desc_zh: 武装部队正在试验人形机器人，但距离战场部署还有一段距离。

items.title_en: OpenAI plans to go public, intensifying investment race with Anthropic
items.title_zh: OpenAI拟上市，与Anthropic的投资竞赛加剧
items.desc_en: The company behind ChatGPT filed its plans one week after Anthropic did the same.
items.desc_zh: ChatGPT 背后的公司在 Anthropic 提交计划一周后也提出了同样的计划。

items.title_en: Apple unveils Siri AI makeover as Tim Cook bids farewell
items.title_zh: 蒂姆·库克 (Tim Cook) 告别之际，苹果推出 Siri AI 改造版
items.desc_en: The technology giant also revealed a series of new child safety features amid widespread scrutiny over "nudification" apps.
items.desc_zh: 在对“裸体”应用程序的广泛审查中，这家科技巨头还推出了一系列新的儿童安全功能。

items.title_en: Jailed crypto founder Sam Bankman-Fried seeks Trump pardon
items.title_zh: 被监禁的加密货币创始人萨姆·班克曼·弗里德寻求特朗普赦免
items.desc_en: The former leader of crypto platform FTX, currently serving a 25-year sentence, on Monday officially applied to be pardoned.
items.desc_zh: 加密货币平台 FTX 的前领导人目前正在服刑 25 年，周一正式申请赦免。

items.title_en: Starmer tells Apple and Google to ban nude images on children's phones
items.title_zh: 斯塔默告诉苹果和谷歌禁止儿童手机上出现裸照
items.desc_en: Firms will be expected to activate built-in features to stop children accessing sexually explicit images.
items.desc_zh: 公司将被期望激活内置功能来阻止儿童访问露骨的色情图片。

items.title_en: The gamers taking on the industry to stop it switching off games
items.title_zh: 游戏玩家向行业发起挑战，阻止其关闭游戏
items.desc_en: Stop Killing Games is challenging the idea publishers can shut down a game without making sure it's still playable.
items.desc_zh: Stop Killing Games 正在挑战发行商可以在不确保游戏仍然可玩的情况下关闭游戏的想法。

items.title_en: Respan Gateway
items.title_zh: Respan Gateway
items.desc_en: One AI gateway with built-in observability and evals
items.desc_zh: 一款具有内置可观察性和评估功能的 AI 网关

items.title_en: Trump to meet AI leaders to discuss US investment in their companies
items.title_zh: 特朗普将与人工智能领导人会面，讨论美国对其公司的投资
items.desc_en: The US president said on Friday he expects to meet the leaders of top AI companies next week.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统周五表示，他预计下周将与顶级人工智能公司的领导人会面。

items.title_en: Raspberry Pi raises profit forecast as AI demand grows
items.title_zh: 随着人工智能需求的增长，Raspberry Pi 提高了利润预期
items.desc_en: The firm said it expected to deliver adjusted earnings of at least $38m (£28.2m) for the first half of 2026.
items.desc_zh: 该公司表示，预计 2026 年上半年调整后收益至少为 3800 万美元（2820 万英镑）。

items.desc_zh: 这家科技公司宣布推出新的 Majorana 2 芯片。
